scripts.sync:changelog:
node -e "const fs=require('fs');const src='../CHANGELOG.md';if(fs.existsSync(src)){fs.copyFileSync(src,'CHANGELOG.md');console.log('synced CHANGELOG.md from repo root')}else if(fs.existsSync('CHANGELOG.md')){console.log('repo-root CHANGELOG.md not found; keeping existing website/CHANGELOG.md')}else{fs.writeFileSync('CHANGELOG.md','# Changelog

_No changelog available in this build context._
');console.warn('WARN: no CHANGELOG.md found; wrote placeholder')}"
